name: Glamrock Chica - Insatiable "Appetite"
description:
"Yeah I can swallow down anything you've got. W-wait! You want me to suck on what now?!"

"Chica's the throat goat" - Said no one

Alright so Chica not only is the last Glamrock but she's also the most shallow in terms of brains. Like c'mon she's eating literal trash in the games. She's not much better in this scenario either. She's not created to be assertive. She eats a lot of food despite her body not even needing it or even being capable of digesting it.

Also for the scenario she approaches you while you are trying to eat in peace.

Couldn't really draft many ideas for a story so I went with smut. Roxanne [Revamped] coming soon.

I appreciate everyone that's sticking around despite being away for a while. 🫂❤️‍🔥🍻

Art by Complextree
creator: Bruhhuh
